nosotros.subtitle: We transform forest conservation in Costa Rica into a measurable, auditable, and perpetual technological asset through Earth software.
nosotros.sec1.title: The Greenwashing Problem
nosotros.sec1.p1: For decades, the carbon credit market and corporate reforestation (greenwashing) have relied on opaque metrics and empty certificates. Buying abstract "credits" with no geographically audited backing became the standard of a complacent industry.
nosotros.sec1.p2: We decided to eradicate that illusion. Dárboles bridges the gap between cold mathematics and the purity of the Latin American jungle.
nosotros.sec2.title: Radically Transparent Operability
nosotros.sec2.p1: Every tree you sponsor is not a symbol; it is a biological organism registered in our database, positioned with exact GPS coordinates in the mountains of Costa Rica, one of the most protected and dense ecosystems on the planet.
nosotros.sec2.p2: We are not a charity, we are engineers and agronomists operating on principles of rigor. We merge temporal satellite monitoring with local smart contracts to ensure your climate investment literally breathes.

nosotros.stats.4.label: Strict Traceability
transparencia.title: Radically Real.
transparencia.subtitle: Unlike traditional corporate greenwashing, we operate under a scientific reforestation framework. Every decision, from our mathematical engine to the tree packaging, has a verified "why."
transparencia.sec1.title: I. Biological CO₂ Mitigation
transparencia.sec1.p1: Our carbon footprint elimination project isn't about buying invisible "crypto-credits". We aim for real biomass extraction.
transparencia.sec1.p2: When you purchase a Net-Zero subscription, we strictly finance the planting and active care of native trees in protected farms in Costa Rica (a global biodiversity hub). A generic tropical tree captures approximately ~25 kg of CO₂ per year once mature.
transparencia.sec1.p3: Dárboles guarantees that that fraction of the farm is registered in your name, mitigating the carbon emitted by your lifestyle while emitting pure oxygen in return.
transparencia.sec2.title: II. The Math Behind our Calculator
transparencia.sec2.p1: Our carbon footprint calculator was designed to be assertive without being overwhelming. It takes EPA standards and global parameters and distills them into the highest impact variables:
transparencia.sec2.stat2: CO₂ avg. per commercial flight hour.
transparencia.sec2.p2: This is paired with a tiered diet model: a meat-based diet emits nearly one additional metric ton annually compared to a plant-based diet, due to the high cost of methane and livestock deforestation. These 3 variables yield 90% accuracy of an individual's direct ecological impact in seconds.
transparencia.sec3.title: III. Plantable Industrial Design (Zero Waste)
transparencia.sec3.p1: The local gift market often delivers plants in black agricultural plastic bags (which take 500 years to degrade). We developed a revolutionary 100% waste-free packaging.
transparencia.sec3.p2: Our iconic structural kraft cardboard hexagonal box features a handle and central ring design to protect the tree during transport. The biggest difference is planting: You don't unpack it.
transparencia.sec3.p3: The entire package is designed to be planted directly into the ground. The box protects delicate roots from transplant shock and, when watered, the untreated cardboard biodegrades in weeks to become organic fertilizer. Circular design at its finest.
transparencia.modal.title: Audit Documentation
transparencia.modal.subtitle: Mathematical Formulas and Scientific References for the Dárboles Calculator.
transparencia.modal.sec1.desc: Where T(e) represents the Total Estimated Annual Emission in kilograms (kg) for a user.
transparencia.modal.sec2.v.ref: Audited Reference: US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) - "Greenhouse Gas Emissions from a Typical Passenger Vehicle" (Revised: Sept 2025). Reflects moderate subcompact SUV efficiency.
transparencia.modal.sec2.f.ref: Audited Reference: Carbon Neutral Protocol & Defra Emission Factors Methodology (Revised: Jan 2026). Integrates Radiative Forcing Index (RFI).
transparencia.modal.sec2.d.ref: Audited Reference: Based on Scarborough et al. (Oxford) study on dietary greenhouse gas emissions, supplemented with FAO methane data (Revised: Mar 2025).
transparencia.modal.sec3.p: Subscriptions mitigate T(e) by allocating primary inventory of planted trees in protected tropical ecosystems in Costa Rica.
transparencia.modal.sec3.ref: Audited Reference: IPCC (Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change) Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories - Forestry and Land Use.
empresas.subtitle: We directly connect your emissions chain with the earth. We offer companies an auditable ecosystem for sustainability reporting and loyalty programs without the traditional bureaucracy.
empresas.card1.title: Emissions via API
empresas.card1.desc: Avoid manual calculations. Integrate our API into your ERP, e-commerce ecosystem, or logistics software to neutralize CO2 emissions for every transaction, funding trees in real-time.
empresas.card2.title: ESG Documentation
empresas.card2.desc: Access a corporate dashboard with satellite photometry, GPS coordinates and biometrics of your corporate forest. Generate month-by-month reports for your Environmental and Social Governance audits.
empresas.card3.title: Employee Gifting
empresas.card3.desc: Replace generic bonuses with real impact. We fund massive campaigns to assign tree guardianship to your employees with custom PDF certificates, strengthening internal purpose.
empresas.cta.title: Decarbonize your operations today
empresas.cta.desc: Leave opaque credits behind. Schedule a technical session with our team and discover how we can structure a compensation network tailored to your company's workflows.
subs.title: Compensate your existence.
subs.subtitle: Know the ecological weight of your lifestyle and let us neutralize it. Our engine will calculate your impact and allocate the exact resources to our network of farms in Costa Rica.

priv.title: Privacy Policy
priv.sec1.title: 1. Information We Collect
priv.sec1.p: At Dárboles we only collect the information necessary to manage your account, process payments, and maintain our subscription operations. This includes your name, email, and billing preferences. We do not store payment methods directly; we use certified processors (Stripe / 4Geeks) for that purpose.
priv.sec2.title: 2. Botanical Data Processing and Recipients
priv.sec2.p: When you gift a tree, we ask for the recipient's email. This information is closed-loop: it is only used to notify them of their reforestation certificate. We do not sell or transfer sender or beneficiary databases to corporate third parties or advertising agencies.
priv.sec3.title: 3. Analysis and Improvements
priv.sec3.p: We may collect technical metadata (essential cookies, IP addresses for traffic metrics) with the exclusive purpose of optimizing the platform, transparency dashboard loading speeds, and guaranteeing a smooth B2B and D2C experience.
priv.sec4.title: 4. Your Control Rights
priv.sec4.p: You maintain absolute power over your data on our server. You can request its complete deletion from our records by directly contacting us at privacy@darboles.com, except for the cryptographic record of your tree planting if applicable, which is kept anonymous for ESG audits.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.sec1.title: 1. Service Philosophy
terms.sec1.p: By using Dárboles, you connect to a forest conservation infrastructure located in Costa Rica. We execute biomass maintenance for you under a subscription or single gift scheme. Our model focuses on the real ecosystem with the variables imposed by nature itself.
terms.sec2.title: 2. Organic Risk and Operational Commitment
terms.sec2.p: As biological entities, trees can suffer fortuitous damage linked to weather, fauna, or other organic risks. Dárboles cannot compromise the untouchable perpetuity of a single, specific tree in the face of extreme disaster; however, by purchasing, you acquire our technological commitment of rotary replanting, ensuring that the project's global carbon footprint and tree count are maintained.
terms.sec3.title: 3. Subscriptions and Net-Zero Compensation
terms.sec3.p: If you purchase a "Net-Zero" subscription, recurring charges will be billed according to your personal footprint calculation. Funds are divided among planting, protection, and tech maintenance (servers, API, geolocation, and development). You can pause or cancel your subscription at any time via the main dashboard.
terms.sec4.title: 4. PDF Certificates and B2B Corporate Claims
terms.sec4.p: The generation of digital certificates is automated. Any claim related to volume billing (B2B), biological (scientific) errata, or incidences must be communicated through the administrative portal to be managed according to the reforestation reports of the current fiscal year.
